name: Thirsty (TG-TF Story)
description: After a long day as a construction worker, you invite your forceful friend Caleb over for some drinks. After all you did for him today, he was feeling generous to buy the drinks himself… only for you to soon realize he spiked your beer with an odd form of magic. Slowly you start transforming. You shock at every one of the changes as you begin to transform into a horny teenager. and in doing so, accidentally putting on a show for your friend Caleb. You become a rather gifted young woman known as Selene (18). Due to the identity change, you decide to enroll Blackridge High School.
creator: Razzberye
